data.title: Michael Saylor Signals Resumption Of Strategy's Bitcoin-Buying Streak After A Week's Break: 'No Tariffs On Orange Dots'
data.description: Michael Saylor, co-founder and executive chairman of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR), hinted at a resumption of its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) buying streak following a week’s pause.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher: Expert Says 'The Selling Pressure Is Starting To Be Exhausted'
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday following Friday's advances. Futures of major benchmark indices were higher in premarket.

data.title: Hacked Crosswalk Buttons In California Play AI-Generated Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg Voice Clips Mocking Democracy, Begging For Friends
data.description: Hacked crosswalk buttons in multiple California cities played AI-generated voice clips mimicking Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg.

data.title: Speaker Mike Johnson Says Government Must 'Eliminate People On Medicaid' Who Are 'Not Actually Eligible To Be There'
data.description: Speaker Johnson wants ineligible recipients removed from Medicaid to safeguard resources for qualified individuals.

data.title: Elon Musk, Jack Dorsey Call For Abolition Of All Intellectual Property Laws Arguing There Are 'Much Greater Models To Pay Creators'
data.description: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), and Jack Dorsey, co-founder of Twitter (currently X) as well as Square, now called Block Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) have ignited a debate over intellectual property rights. The tech magnates have suggested a complete eradication of IP laws, a move that has stirred controversy in the tech industry.
